summary: Tested 3 new features: 1) Customer Tracking Page (/track/:code), 2) Drag & Drop job reordering in PlanFlow, 3) QR code generation on job cards. All 12 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_TrackingCode_Job to verify new jobs get tracking_code (deleted after test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 new features fully tested and working: 1) Customer Tracking Page at /track/:code - shows job status with 3-step progress (Sırada Bekliyor → Üretimde → Tamamlandı), no auth required. Sample code QPF64LLJ for 'Et Yiyelim' job. 2) Drag & Drop reordering - GripVertical drag handles visible on job cards in PlanFlow, PUT /api/jobs/reorder-batch endpoint working. 3) QR codes - QR button on each job card in PlanFlow opens dialog with QRCodeSVG, print and copy link buttons. OperatorFlow has 'QR Tara' button for scanning. Jobs have tracking_code field (8 chars alphanumeric).

details: GET /api/track/{tracking_code} returns job info for valid code
Response includes: tracking_code, job_name, status, status_text, koli_count, delivery_date
Frontend /track shows search input and back button
Frontend /track/:code shows job name, 3-step progress, status badge, delivery date
Home page has 'Siparis Takip' module card linking to /track
PUT /api/jobs/reorder-batch accepts array of job_id/order pairs
PlanFlow has DndContext wrapping job list
GripVertical drag handles visible on job cards (data-testid='drag-handle-{id}')
5 drag handles found on PlanFlow page
Jobs include tracking_code field (8 chars alphanumeric)
PlanFlow has QR button on each job card
QR dialog shows QRCodeSVG, tracking code, print button, copy link button
OperatorFlow has 'QR Tara' button for scanning (camera-dependent)
Tracking code badge visible on job cards (clickable to copy)
